No fanfare
item.description:
George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 5min End of an era. The most credible wrestler to ever step in the ring
No fanfare. No retirement tour. Just ride off into the sunset.
Will miss Brock Lesnar No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 5 299

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 21min Put together some data from Kiper, Jeremiah, Brugler and Schrager for their final mocks since 202
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 21min Put together some data from Kiper, Jeremiah, Brugler and Schrager for their final mocks since 2022. Its a bit unfair bc Kiper seems to release his final mock earlier than the others. Nonetheless. Here is how each have fared overall, just picks 11-32 (tougher in general to hit) Mostrar más 2 15 3 mil
